title: Profile
description: Personal profile information for Riku Lauttia

personal.name: Riku Lauttia
personal.bio: AI engineer and founder building production AI systems, software infrastructure, and AI-native technology ventures.
personal.bioLong: I am an AI engineer and founder working at the intersection of machine learning, software infrastructure, and venture building. My work focuses on turning technical ideas into production systems, companies, and communities. I am especially interested in AI systems that create measurable value in real operational environments — not just demos or prototypes. I have founded and co-founded several technology initiatives across AI, automation, recruiting, and software consulting. Alongside company building, I work on production AI systems and continue to deepen my technical foundation in machine learning, data systems, and infrastructure. I study Machine Learning, Data Science and Artificial Intelligence at Aalto University. The long-term goal is simple: build useful AI systems, strong technology companies, and globally relevant technical work.

availability.message: Available for AI systems, software, partnerships, and company-building discussions.

education.field: Machine Learning, Data Science and Artificial Intelligence

seo.title: Riku Lauttia — AI Engineer & Founder
seo.description: Riku Lauttia is an AI engineer and founder focused on production AI systems, machine learning, software infrastructure, automation, and AI-native ventures.
